title: Ice Cubes, Fruit Shapes. Approved Reusable Plastic Washable Assorted Fruit Shaped Ice Cubes (Pack of 20)
features: Fun and colourful, bright and cheerful, assorted fruit shaped ice cubes, quick to freeze, easy to wash and reuse.
Handy pack of 20 pieces, keep all of the family happy with cooled drinks.
Does not dilute your drink yet still chills as a regular ice cube would.
description: Fun and colourful assorted fruit shaped ice cubes, quick to freeze, easy to wash and reuse. Put a smile on everyones face with these fun shaped bright and cheerful ice cubes. Does not dilute the drink as the frozen water remains within the plastic shape, ready for re-freezing and re-using, providing excellent value for money and kind to the environment. Clean the shapes before first use and place them in the freezer. Once frozen, add to a glass/cup, pour your drink and allow the fun fruit shapes to cool your drink for you. After you have finished your drink and the fruit shapes have defrosted, simply rinse with clean water and re-freeze ready for next time. Handy pack of 20 assorted fruit shapes provides ample pieces to keep all the family's drinks chilled.
